#!/bin/bash
# ============================================================
# WeCreator 一键部署脚本
# 用法: bash deploy.sh [backend|frontend|all]
# ============================================================

set -euo pipefail

SERVER="root@47.95.66.155"
SSH_KEY="$HOME/.ssh/wc_deploy_ed25519"
SSH_CMD="ssh -i $SSH_KEY -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no $SERVER"
LOCAL_DIR="/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/"
REMOTE_DIR="/root/wecreator/"
COMPOSE="docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file docker/.env.prod"
TARGET="${1:-all}"

echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo "🚀 WeCreator Deploy — target: $TARGET"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

# ── Step 1: Sync code ──────────────────────────
echo ""
echo "📦 Step 1: Syncing code to server..."
rsync -az --delete \
  --exclude 'node_modules' \
  --exclude '.pnpm-store' \
  --exclude 'dist' \
  --exclude '.git' \
  --exclude 'docker/.env.prod' \
  --exclude 'docker/.env' \
  --exclude 'sessions' \
  -e "ssh -i $SSH_KEY -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" \
  "$LOCAL_DIR" "$SERVER:$REMOTE_DIR"

echo "   ✅ Code synced"

# ── Step 2: Build & restart ────────────────────
echo ""
echo "🔨 Step 2: Building & restarting on server..."

case "$TARGET" in
  backend)
    echo "   → Building backend..."
    $SSH_CMD "cd $REMOTE_DIR && $COMPOSE build backend && $COMPOSE up -d backend"
    ;;
  frontend)
    echo "   → Building pc-admin frontend..."
    $SSH_CMD "cd $REMOTE_DIR && $COMPOSE build pc-admin-build && $COMPOSE up -d pc-admin-build nginx"
    ;;
  all|*)
    echo "   → Building backend + pc-admin..."
    $SSH_CMD "cd $REMOTE_DIR && $COMPOSE build backend pc-admin-build && $COMPOSE up -d"
    ;;
esac

echo "   ✅ Services restarted"

# ── Step 3: DB migration (if needed) ──────────
if [[ "$TARGET" == "all" || "$TARGET" == "backend" ]]; then
  echo ""
  echo "🗄️  Step 3: Running database migration..."
  sleep 10
  $SSH_CMD "docker exec wc-backend sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss' 2>&1" || echo "   ⚠️  Migration skipped (may need manual run)"
  echo "   ✅ Database in sync"
fi

# ── Step 4: Cleanup ────────────────────────────
echo ""
echo "🧹 Step 4: Cleaning up..."
$SSH_CMD "docker image prune -f > /dev/null 2>&1; docker builder prune -f > /dev/null 2>&1" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "   ✅ Cleaned"

# ── Step 5: Verify ─────────────────────────────
echo ""
echo "🔍 Step 5: Verifying deployment..."
sleep 8
$SSH_CMD "docker ps --filter name=wc- --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}'"

echo ""
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo "✅ Deploy complete!"
echo ""
echo "   PC Admin:  http://47.95.66.155:8080"
echo "   Platform:  http://47.95.66.155:8081"
echo "   API:       http://47.95.66.155:8088/api/v1/"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

# ============================================================
# WeCreator — Docker Compose 生产环境
# 包含: MySQL + Redis + MongoDB + Backend + Nginx
# 用法: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
# ============================================================

version: '3.8'

services:
  # ── MySQL 8.0 主数据库 ─────────────────────
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: wc-mysql
    restart: always
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD}
      MYSQL_DATABASE: ${MYSQL_DATABASE:-wecreator}
      MYSQL_USER: ${MYSQL_USER:-wcadmin}
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_PASSWORD}
    # MySQL 不暴露到宿主机（现有服务已占 3306，只在 docker 内网使用）
    expose:
      - "3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./init-sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
      - ./mysql-conf:/etc/mysql/conf.d
    command: >
      --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password
      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      --max-connections=500
      --innodb-buffer-pool-size=1G
      --slow-query-log=1
      --long-query-time=2
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "root", "-p${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - wc-net

  # ── Redis 7.x 缓存 + 分布式锁 ─────────────
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: wc-redis
    restart: always
    # Redis 不暴露到宿主机（只在 docker 内网使用）
    expose:
      - "6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    command: >
      redis-server
      --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
      --maxmemory 512mb
      --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
      --appendonly yes
      --appendfsync everysec
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASSWORD}", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - wc-net

  # ── MongoDB 6.0 消息存储 ───────────────────
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:6.0
    container_name: wc-mongodb
    restart: always
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: ${MONGO_USER:-wcadmin}
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MONGO_PASSWORD}
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: ${MONGO_DATABASE:-wecreator_msg}
    # Mongo 不暴露到宿主机（只在 docker 内网使用）
    expose:
      - "27017"
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mongosh", "--eval", "db.adminCommand('ping')"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - wc-net

  # ── NestJS 后端 API ────────────────────────
  backend:
    build:
      context: ../
      dockerfile: apps/backend/Dockerfile
    container_name: wc-backend
    restart: always
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: 3000
      DATABASE_URL: mysql://${MYSQL_USER:-wcadmin}:${MYSQL_PASSWORD}@mysql:3306/${MYSQL_DATABASE:-wecreator}
      REDIS_URL: redis://:${REDIS_PASSWORD}@redis:6379
      MONGODB_URL: mongodb://${MONGO_USER:-wcadmin}:${MONGO_PASSWORD}@mongodb:27017/${MONGO_DATABASE:-wecreator_msg}?authSource=admin
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET}
      JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES: ${JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES:-2h}
      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET}
      JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES: ${JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES:-7d}
      AES_KEY: ${AES_KEY}
      AES_IV: ${AES_IV}
      WECHAT_APPID: ${WECHAT_APPID}
      WECHAT_SECRET: ${WECHAT_SECRET}
      OSS_BUCKET: ${OSS_BUCKET}
      OSS_REGION: ${OSS_REGION}
      OSS_ACCESS_KEY: ${OSS_ACCESS_KEY}
      OSS_SECRET: ${OSS_SECRET}
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      mongodb:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - wc-net

  # ── Nginx 反向代理 + 静态托管 ──────────────
  nginx:
    image: nginx:1.27-alpine
    container_name: wc-nginx
    restart: always
    # 宿主机 80 被现有 nginx 占用，我们用高端口
    # 8080 = PC 企业后台、8081 = 平台运营、8088 = API 网关（小程序用）
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
      - "8081:8081"
      - "8088:8088"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
      - pc_admin_dist:/usr/share/nginx/html/pc-admin:ro
      - platform_admin_dist:/usr/share/nginx/html/platform-admin:ro
    depends_on:
      - backend
    networks:
      - wc-net

  # ── 前端构建 Sidecar（一次性构建，输出到 volume）──
  pc-admin-build:
    build:
      context: ../
      dockerfile: apps/pc-admin/Dockerfile
    container_name: wc-pc-build
    volumes:
      - pc_admin_dist:/usr/share/nginx/html/pc-admin

  platform-admin-build:
    build:
      context: ../
      dockerfile: apps/platform-admin/Dockerfile
    container_name: wc-platform-build
    volumes:
      - platform_admin_dist:/usr/share/nginx/html/platform-admin

volumes:
  mysql_data:
    driver: local
  redis_data:
    driver: local
  mongodb_data:
    driver: local
  pc_admin_dist:
    driver: local
  platform_admin_dist:
    driver: local

networks:
  wc-net:
    driver: bridge

问题找到了。看服务器上的容器状态：

- **wc-nginx** — `Created` 状态，没有启动
- **wc-backend** — `Created` 状态，没有启动
- **wc-mongodb** — `Restarting` 循环重启中
- wc-mysql / wc-redis — 正常运行
- wc-pc-build / wc-platform-build — 构建容器在运行

根本原因链条是：**MongoDB 在循环重启 → backend 依赖 MongoDB healthy 所以无法启动 → nginx 依赖 backend 所以也无法启动**。

让我先看看 MongoDB 为什么在重启：

arguments.command: ssh -i ~/.ssh/wc_deploy_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@47.95.66.155 "docker logs wc-mongodb --tail 50 2>&1"

确认了，**服务器磁盘 100% 满了**（79G 用了 77G，0 可用）。

问题链条很清楚：

```
磁盘满 → MongoDB 无法写入 journal 文件 → MongoDB 崩溃循环重启
       → Backend 依赖 MongoDB healthy，无法启动
       → Nginx 依赖 Backend，也无法启动
       → 网站不可访问
```

Docker 占用情况：镜像 4.3GB + 容器数据 3.6GB + 构建缓存 1.6GB。可以先清理构建缓存和无用镜像来释放空间。

echo ''
echo '=== 清理无用镜像 ==='
docker image prune -af
echo ''
echo '=== 清理后磁盘 ==='
df -h /

这是当前的情况总结：

**要恢复网站，需要两步：**

1. **删除 `/root/backend/` 目录**释放 51GB 空间（这是旧的 Java 中台项目，跟 WeCreator 无关）
2. **重启 MongoDB → Backend → Nginx** 容器

确认一下：`/root/backend/jiyou-lili-java-zhongtai` 这个旧项目可以删掉吗？删了之后我就重启所有服务。
不可以删，直接给我重启服务的命令

现在有 1.4GB 可用空间，够 MongoDB 启动了。直接重启：

```bash
ssh -i ~/.ssh/wc_deploy_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@47.95.66.155 "
cd /root/wecreator && \
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file docker/.env.prod restart mongodb && \

sleep 8 && \
docker ps --filter name=wc- --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}'
"
```

不过要提醒你，磁盘 99% 的状态下 MongoDB 随时可能再次因为空间不足崩溃。1.4GB 对 MongoDB 来说只是勉强够用，运行一段时间数据增长后大概率会再出问题。后续还是得想办法腾空间。

代码已经同步到服务器了（时间戳一致）。问题是 **容器用的是之前 build 的旧镜像**，代码虽然同步了，但没有重新构建 Docker 镜像。

你之前执行 `deploy.sh all` 时，因为磁盘满，build 步骤大概率失败了，容器还是用的旧镜像。

所以你需要重新构建并启动。完整命令：

```bash
ssh -i ~/.ssh/wc_deploy_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@47.95.66.155 "
cd /root/wecreator && \
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file docker/.env.prod restart mongodb && \
sleep 15 && \
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file docker/.env.prod build backend pc-admin-build && \
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file docker/.env.prod up -d && \
sleep 10 && \
docker ps --filter name=wc- --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}'
"
```

但这里有个现实问题：**磁盘只剩 1.4GB，Docker build 需要下载依赖、编译代码，空间大概率不够**。构建 NestJS 后端 + Vue 前端通常需要 2-3GB 临时空间。

你有几个选择：

1. **清理 `/root/backend/` 那个 51GB 旧项目**（最直接）
2. **清理 `/www` 目录**（6.8GB，看是否还在用）
3. **给服务器扩容磁盘**
4. **在本地 build 好镜像，push 到服务器**（避免服务器上 build）

不腾空间的话，重新 build 大概率会再次因为磁盘满失败。

这些目录内容并不一样啊，每个项目都有各自的文件。你说的"一样的"具体是指什么？

是不是说每个文件夹里都有个 `.DS_Store` 文件？那个是 macOS 自动生成的隐藏文件，rsync 同步时一起传上去了。它不影响任何功能，只是 macOS 的目录元数据缓存。

如果你想清理掉它们，可以在 `deploy.sh` 的 rsync 里加一行排除：

```
--exclude '.DS_Store'
```

找到了一批可以安全清理的东西：

- `/root/glibc-2.28` + `/root/__MACOSX` + `/root/make-4.3` — 编译 glibc 的源码和残留，共 **~900MB**
- `/var/cache/yum` — yum 包缓存 **894MB**

这些都是编译残留和包管理缓存，删了不影响任何运行中的服务。清理后能多出约 **1.8GB**，加上现有的 869MB，总共约 **2.7GB**，够 MongoDB 和 Backend 启动了。

- `/root/glibc-2.28`（glibc 源码，828MB）
- `/root/__MACOSX`（macOS 解压残留，72MB）
- `/root/make-4.3`（make 源码，14MB）
- `/var/cache/yum`（yum 缓存，894MB，`yum clean all` 清理）
清理 然后启动服务

arguments.command:
ssh -i ~/.ssh/wc_deploy_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@47.95.66.155 "

echo '等待 MongoDB 健康...'
for i in \$(seq 1 30); do
  STATUS=\$(docker inspect --format='{{.State.Health.Status}}' wc-mongodb 2>/dev/null)
  if [ \"\$STATUS\" = \"healthy\" ]; then
    echo \"MongoDB healthy!\"
    break
  fi
  echo \"  [\$i] MongoDB: \$STATUS\"
  sleep 2
done

echo ''

sleep 8

echo ''
echo '=== 最终状态 ==='
docker ps --filter name=wc- --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}'
"

# ============================================================
# WeCreator PC Admin — Multi-stage Dockerfile
# Vue 3 + Vite → Nginx 静态托管
# ============================================================

# ── Stage 1: 构建 ─────────────────────────────
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder

RUN sed -i 's|dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org|mirrors.aliyun.com|g' /etc/apk/repositories

RUN corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10 --activate && \
    pnpm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com

WORKDIR /app

# 拷贝 workspace 根配置
COPY package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml ./
COPY packages/shared/package.json packages/shared/
COPY apps/pc-admin/package.json apps/pc-admin/

RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# 拷贝源码
COPY packages/shared/ packages/shared/
COPY apps/pc-admin/ apps/pc-admin/

# 构建（跳过 vue-tsc，本地已 typecheck；服务端唯构建产物）
RUN cd apps/pc-admin && pnpm exec vite build

# ── Stage 2: Nginx 托管（此阶段仅用于 volume 注入）
FROM nginx:1.27-alpine AS runner

# 拷贝构建产物到 Nginx 目录
COPY --from=builder /app/apps/pc-admin/dist /usr/share/nginx/html/pc-admin

EXPOSE 80

明白了。问题在于 Docker volume 的工作方式。`pc_admin_dist` 是一个 named volume，Docker 只在 **volume 首次创建时** 把镜像里的文件拷贝进去。之后即使镜像更新了，volume 里的旧文件不会被覆盖。

需要先删掉旧 volume 再重建：

echo '=== 删除容器（才能删 volume）==='

echo ''
echo '=== 删除旧 volume ==='
docker volume rm docker_pc_admin_dist docker_platform_admin_dist 2>/dev/null || true

echo ''

"

#!/bin/bash
# ============================================================
# WeCreator 一键部署脚本
# 用法: bash deploy.sh [backend|frontend|all]
# ============================================================

set -euo pipefail

SERVER="root@47.95.66.155"
SSH_KEY="$HOME/.ssh/wc_deploy_ed25519"
SSH_CMD="ssh -i $SSH_KEY -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no $SERVER"
LOCAL_DIR="/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/"
REMOTE_DIR="/root/wecreator/"
COMPOSE="docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file docker/.env.prod"
TARGET="${1:-all}"

echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo "🚀 WeCreator Deploy — target: $TARGET"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"

# ── Step 1: Sync code ──────────────────────────
echo ""
echo "📦 Step 1: Syncing code to server..."
rsync -az --delete \
  --exclude 'node_modules' \
  --exclude '.pnpm-store' \
  --exclude 'dist' \
  --exclude '.git' \
  --exclude 'docker/.env.prod' \
  --exclude 'docker/.env' \
  --exclude 'sessions' \
  -e "ssh -i $SSH_KEY -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" \
  "$LOCAL_DIR" "$SERVER:$REMOTE_DIR"

echo "   ✅ Code synced"

# ── Step 2: Build & restart ────────────────────
echo ""
echo "🔨 Step 2: Building & restarting on server..."

case "$TARGET" in
  backend)
    echo "   → Building backend..."
    $SSH_CMD "cd $REMOTE_DIR && $COMPOSE build backend && $COMPOSE up -d backend"
    ;;
  frontend)
    echo "   → Building pc-admin frontend..."
    $SSH_CMD "cd $REMOTE_DIR && $COMPOSE build pc-admin-build && $COMPOSE up -d pc-admin-build nginx"
    ;;
  all|*)
    echo "   → Building backend + pc-admin..."
    $SSH_CMD "cd $REMOTE_DIR && $COMPOSE build backend pc-admin-build && $COMPOSE up -d"
    ;;
esac

echo "   ✅ Services restarted"

# ── Step 3: DB migration (if needed) ──────────
if [[ "$TARGET" == "all" || "$TARGET" == "backend" ]]; then
  echo ""
  echo "🗄️  Step 3: Running database migration..."
  sleep 10
  $SSH_CMD "docker exec wc-backend sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss' 2>&1" || echo "   ⚠️  Migration skipped (may need manual run)"
  echo "   ✅ Database in sync"
fi

# ── Step 4: Cleanup ────────────────────────────
echo ""
echo "🧹 Step 4: Cleaning up..."
$SSH_CMD "docker image prune -f > /dev/null 2>&1; docker builder prune -f > /dev/null 2>&1" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "   ✅ Cleaned"

# ── Step 5: Verify ─────────────────────────────
echo ""
echo "🔍 Step 5: Verifying deployment..."
sleep 8
$SSH_CMD "docker ps --filter name=wc- --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}'"

echo ""

echo "✅ Deploy complete!"
